content_of_post_to_comment: I think people think peace is not caring too much anymore, detaching, being so chilled out that nothing really matters anymore. I don’t think it is. I think it is about being who you are, showing up, working hard, saying what you feel and being incredibly discerning. Living your truth, to me, is peace. No unnecessary fluff, no pretence. Just you. Living your life.
comment: One tension here is whether ‘saying what you feel’ means privileging the first layer of feeling, or the more filtered one that emerges after reflection—peace might depend on that distinction.
